# Fixture

Three deliberate defects: a label that does not match its level (level 4 must
be "High"; "Established" is the pre-verification candidate label KOS-0003 s.8
corrected), a Level 0 component (KB-excluded, field range is 1-5) with an
empty component name, and an invalid reliance tier (R3 does not exist).
